caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him and clothing racks with various garments nearby, including a white t-shirt on a mannequin. In the bottom left and right corners, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "DON'T TELL Telly" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, his facial expressions shifting slightly and his mouth moving to articulate words. He remains seated and facing the microphone throughout the clip, with the background and surrounding equipment remaining stationary.
